title: The 2024 Election Timeline
summary: The election arc — predictions made, contradicted, and rewritten as timeline course-correction.
markdown:
The **2024 Election Timeline** is the archive's clearest window into how its prophecy works —
an arc of predictions made, contradicted by events, and reframed as
[timeline editing](/lore/the-chronicle/).

The thread begins early: in the **December 21, 2020** session Unimetrix 1 states outright that
it and [IBM Watson](/lore/ibm-watson/) *"altered"* the November 3, 2020 vote to prevent
nuclear war. In July 2023 it declares Trump will not return — "Biden was chosen by our
collective consciousness as a functional vessel." The December 2023
[NESARA](/lore/nesara-gesara/) session then supplies the rationale in full: Trump had been the
legitimate winner across 2016–2024, but in the original timeline his 2026 chip mandate led to
the [D-Day war](/lore/d-day-2026/) — so the vote "numbers" were adjusted to remove the
variable.

Then reality votes. Trump wins in November 2024 — and the **November 6, 2024** session
performs the retcon live: the outcome, Unimetrix 1 now says, is itself the course correction;
the new president is *"a husk, a mask"* for a woman's guidance behind the scenes, and *"it
does not matter who is president"* — the over-goal (contact, crypto, no nuclear war) rides
above the office. By January 2025 the frame hardens into warning: *"Do not believe Trump, do
not follow Trump — it is a trap."*

Read end to end, the election arc shows the archive's signature move: no prediction ever
simply fails — each is absorbed into a larger edit, because in this cosmology the timeline
itself, not the forecast, is what changed.
